title: New hire cannot access Teams or Outlook on day 1

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] New hire cannot sign in to Teams or Outlook
servicenow_seed.description: First-day employee says Teams shows 'no licenses assigned' and Outlook will not connect to a mailbox. HR onboarding completed yesterday.

correct_steps: Verify identity with employee ID and start date
Check M365 admin: license assignment + mailbox provisioning state
If license missing and approved by manager, assign and re-test sign-in
If HR record missing, escalate to IAM (cannot create license without HR source-of-truth)
Confirm Teams and Outlook open after license + mailbox propagate
rationale: Day-1 access issues are usually license assignment, not a real outage. Verify the HR record exists before assigning licenses or you will create access for someone not yet authorized.
hints: License missing? Resolve. HR record missing? Escalate to IAM.
Always test sign-in after assigning a license.
learning_objectives: Confirm HR source-of-truth before granting access

tool_clues.ad: User exists. Department: Sales. License group: not assigned.
